speaker: Speaker 00
text: Honestly, it's fine. We use spreadsheets mostly. It's free, and I don't really have time to train my team on something new.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: I totally understand. Transitioning tools is a headache. But usually, when I hear "spreadsheets," it means you're spending more time cleaning data than selling. How many hours a week do you think you lose to data entry?

speaker: Speaker 00
text: Probably 5-10 hours, honestly. But it's just too expensive to switch.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: What if I told you that our automation feature saves the average user 8 hours a week? That pays for the software in the first month.

speaker: Speaker 00
text: Maybe. But I don't think it integrates with our email system.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: It does, actually. We have a native integration for [Email Tool]. I can show you in a 5-minute screen share right now if you have a second?

speaker: Speaker 01
text: *shares screen* As you can see, when you click here, it populates the client data automatically...

speaker: Speaker 01
text: It's a game-changer. Let’s get you on the Pro plan so you can automate those follow-ups, too. Does that work?

speaker: Speaker 00
text: Send me the invoice, let's try it for a month.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: Perfect. Invoice sent. I'll also send a calendar link for your onboarding session. Welcome aboard, Mike!
